Quick Start Guide

Get started with Aspose.Cells FOSS for .NET in minutes

← Back to Index

Installation

Step 1: Install the NuGet Package

Open your project directory and run the following command:

dotnet add package Aspose.Cells_FOSS
Step 2: Add Using Directive

Add the following using directive to your C# files:

using Aspose.Cells_FOSS;

Creating Your First Workbook

Step 1: Create a New Workbook
// Create a new workbook with one default worksheet
var workbook = new Workbook();
Step 2: Access a Worksheet
// Get the first worksheet (zero-based index)
var worksheet = workbook.Worksheets[0];
Step 3: Write Data to Cells
// Write headers
worksheet.Cells["A1"].PutValue("Name");
worksheet.Cells["B1"].PutValue("Age");
worksheet.Cells["C1"].PutValue("City");

// Write data rows
worksheet.Cells["A2"].PutValue("John Doe");
worksheet.Cells["B2"].PutValue(30);
worksheet.Cells["C2"].PutValue("New York");

worksheet.Cells["A3"].PutValue("Jane Smith");
worksheet.Cells["B3"].PutValue(25);
worksheet.Cells["C3"].PutValue("London");
Step 4: Apply Basic Formatting
// Get the style of the header row
var headerStyle = worksheet.Cells["A1"].GetStyle();
headerStyle.Font.Bold = true;
headerStyle.Font.Color = System.Drawing.Color.White;
headerStyle.Pattern = FillPattern.Solid;
headerStyle.ForegroundColor = System.Drawing.Color.DarkBlue;

// Apply style to header cells
worksheet.Cells["A1"].SetStyle(headerStyle);
worksheet.Cells["B1"].SetStyle(headerStyle);
worksheet.Cells["C1"].SetStyle(headerStyle);
Step 5: Save the Workbook
// Save to a file
workbook.Save("MyFirstWorkbook.xlsx");

Opening an Existing Workbook

From File Path
// Open an existing workbook
var workbook = new Workbook("ExistingFile.xlsx");

// Access and modify data
var worksheet = workbook.Worksheets[0];
worksheet.Cells["A1"].PutValue("Updated Value");

// Save changes
workbook.Save("UpdatedFile.xlsx");
From Stream
// Open from a stream (useful for web applications)
using (var stream = File.OpenRead("ExistingFile.xlsx"))
{
    var workbook = new Workbook(stream);
    // ... work with the workbook
}

Working with Formulas

Add Formulas to Cells
// Write values
worksheet.Cells["A1"].PutValue(10);
worksheet.Cells["A2"].PutValue(20);
worksheet.Cells["A3"].PutValue(30);

// Add a sum formula
worksheet.Cells["A4"].Formula = "=SUM(A1:A3)";

// Add an average formula
worksheet.Cells["A5"].Formula = "=AVERAGE(A1:A3)";
Note: Formulas are stored as strings and will be calculated when the workbook is opened in Excel.

Working with Dates

Set Date Values
// Set a date value
var today = DateTime.Today;
worksheet.Cells["A1"].PutValue(today);

// Format the cell as a date
var style = worksheet.Cells["A1"].GetStyle();
style.NumberFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd";
worksheet.Cells["A1"].SetStyle(style);
Tip: You can use standard Excel number format strings like "yyyy-MM-dd", "MM/dd/yyyy", "dd-MMM-yyyy", etc.

Common Tasks

Add a New Worksheet
// Add a new worksheet and get its index
int newIndex = workbook.Worksheets.Add("NewSheet");

// Access the new worksheet
var newWorksheet = workbook.Worksheets[newIndex];
Delete a Worksheet
// Remove a worksheet by name
workbook.Worksheets.RemoveAt("Sheet1");

// Or by index
workbook.Worksheets.RemoveAt(0);
Merge Cells
// Merge cells A1:C1 (row 0, column 0, 1 row, 3 columns)
worksheet.Cells.Merge(0, 0, 1, 3);
worksheet.Cells["A1"].PutValue("Merged Header");
Set Cell Colors
// Get cell style
var style = worksheet.Cells["B2"].GetStyle();

// Set background color
style.Pattern = FillPattern.Solid;
style.ForegroundColor = System.Drawing.Color.LightBlue;

// Set font color
style.Font.Color = System.Drawing.Color.DarkBlue;

// Apply style
worksheet.Cells["B2"].SetStyle(style);

Complete Example

Sample Application
using System;
using Aspose.Cells_FOSS;

class Program
{
    static void Main(string[] args)
    {
        // Create a new workbook
        using (var workbook = new Workbook())
        {
            // Get the first worksheet
            var worksheet = workbook.Worksheets[0];
            worksheet.Name = "Sales Data";

            // Write headers
            worksheet.Cells["A1"].PutValue("Product");
            worksheet.Cells["B1"].PutValue("Price");
            worksheet.Cells["C1"].PutValue("Quantity");
            worksheet.Cells["D1"].PutValue("Total");

            // Write data
            worksheet.Cells["A2"].PutValue("Apple");
            worksheet.Cells["B2"].PutValue(1.99);
            worksheet.Cells["C2"].PutValue(10);

            worksheet.Cells["A3"].PutValue("Banana");
            worksheet.Cells["B3"].PutValue(0.99);
            worksheet.Cells["C3"].PutValue(15);

            // Add formulas for totals
            worksheet.Cells["D2"].Formula = "=B2*C2";
            worksheet.Cells["D3"].Formula = "=B3*C3";

            // Format headers
            var headerStyle = worksheet.Cells["A1"].GetStyle();
            headerStyle.Font.Bold = true;
            headerStyle.Font.Color = System.Drawing.Color.White;
            headerStyle.Pattern = FillPattern.Solid;
            headerStyle.ForegroundColor = System.Drawing.Color.DarkBlue;
            worksheet.Cells["A1"].SetStyle(headerStyle);
            worksheet.Cells["B1"].SetStyle(headerStyle);
            worksheet.Cells["C1"].SetStyle(headerStyle);
            worksheet.Cells["D1"].SetStyle(headerStyle);

            // Format numbers
            var numberStyle = worksheet.Cells["B2"].GetStyle();
            numberStyle.NumberFormat = "$#,##0.00";
            worksheet.Cells["B2"].SetStyle(numberStyle);
            worksheet.Cells["B3"].SetStyle(numberStyle);
            worksheet.Cells["D2"].SetStyle(numberStyle);
            worksheet.Cells["D3"].SetStyle(numberStyle);

            // Save the workbook
            workbook.Save("SalesReport.xlsx");

            Console.WriteLine("Workbook created successfully!");
        }
    }
}

Next Steps

  • Explore the API Reference for detailed documentation
  • Check out the Examples page for more code samples
  • Review the main documentation for advanced features
